channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI solo SaaS: build vs buy the stack in 2026
item.description: AI-first solo SaaS stacks cost 27% more to run than AI-assisted stacks — real numbers from 30 days of prod traffic in 2026. Learn which 2026 stack actually saves time and money.

item.title: Webhooks 2026: delivery you can trust
item.description: Stop losing webhook events — delivery guarantees, retries, and idempotency patterns that cut losses 14% and costs 51% in 2026

item.title: 5 AI tools beating higher-cost teams from Nairobi
item.description: Cut dev time 50% with these 5 AI tools — real cost, latency, and bug data from Nairobi teams in 2026. Includes code examples and ROI calculator.

item.title: AI-native apps: forget the old stack
item.description: Cut LLM token costs 60% with state machines and prompt versioning — latency benchmarks, cache keys, and the hidden cost of agent loops in 2026.

item.title: AI tools broke my stack — here’s what I changed
item.description: Cut debugging time 40% by constraining AI tools — guardrails, metrics, and the rollback numbers most teams miss in 2026.

item.title: AI alert triage: cut pages 80% in production
item.description: Cut on-call pages 80% with AI alert triage — Prometheus 3.0, Qdrant 1.9 and a 120-line Python router. False negatives below 3% and $8k yearly savings.

item.title: Pick one API style: gRPC, REST, or tRPC
item.description: Cut API latency 60% by picking the right protocol — gRPC, REST, or tRPC — with real numbers from 5k RPS load tests on Graviton3

item.title: Replace job queues with Temporal in 2026
item.description: The system was supposed to retry failed tasks three times, but after a weekend of AWS Lambda cold starts the queue backed up for 12 hours and we lost 27%…

item.title: Route tasks to LLMs automatically in 2026
item.description: The gap between what the docs say and what production needs I spent two weeks tuning a system that routed every query to the biggest model available —…

item.title: RAG needs reranking: 2026’s default search stack
item.description: Cut RAG hallucinations from 12% to 2.8% in 2026 with hybrid search + reranking. Latency <250 ms, cost <$0.0008/query on c6i.large.

item.title: JSON mode fails: 3 real workflows that broke ours
item.description: Cut LLM parsing errors 97% with structured function calls — how we went from 12% JSON failures to 0.4% and saved $720/month on OpenRouter tokens

item.title: AI sales cycles: why dev tools now need 3 demos
item.description: Cut sales cycle 84% with live Debug Sessions — how one CLI tool moved from videos to GitHub issues in 2026 and turned prospects into buyers in 6 days.

item.title: Astro islands cut JS 80% in 2026
item.description: Astro islands 2026: cut JavaScript 90%, TTI 83% — Vercel 7.2 adapter, Preact hydration, and the bundle budget mistake most teams repeat.

item.title: AI incident bots: PagerDuty vs Opsgenie 2026
item.description: Cut incident response time 41% with AI bots — PagerDuty vs Opsgenie 2026 comparison with concrete costs, latency, and setup steps.

item.title: Signals killed React context: 4 real wins outside
item.description: Cut render time 90% with Signals — Preact Signals vs vanilla Signals vs SolidJS Signals ranked with 2026 benchmarks and memory growth numbers.

item.title: Async Python traps: sync vs trio vs asyncio 2026
item.description: Cut async Python surprises 70% by choosing trio over asyncio — memory leaks, cancellation storms, and debugger traps exposed with Python 3.11 benchmarks.

item.title: AI rollouts live or die by flags
item.description: Reduce AI incident minutes 40% with feature flags in 2026 — 15 ms p95 latency, GDPR-ready audit trails, and $3/month DynamoDB costs using Node 20 LTS and AWS Lambda arm64.

item.title: 9 tests to chase AI bugs without testing AI
item.description: Cut test maintenance 50% with 9 concrete techniques that test behavior, not AI output. From OpenAPI contracts to property-based tests — here’s what actually works in 2026.

item.title: 5 patterns to keep systems up when consistency breaks
item.description: Cut API failure 99.9% with 5 outage-proof patterns — outbox, saga, CRDTs, event sourcing, and versioned cache. Benchmarked at 120k orders/minute with DynamoDB Global Tables and Redis 7.2.

item.title: Lose the .env files: what replaced them in 2026
item.description: Cut secrets leak risk 99% in 2026 with runtime-zeroed secrets — AWS Lambda Extensions, Vault 1.17, and SOPS workarounds for teams still stuck on .env files.
